founders.name: Michael Rodgers
founders.background: AI systems architect building recruiting intelligence, media, and dashboard systems for high school athlete visibility and college coach engagement

product_description: An end-to-end athlete recruiting operating system purpose-built around Jake's college football recruiting journey. The platform integrates highlight reel curation and film management, coach relationship intelligence and outreach tracking, social media visibility amplification (primarily X/Twitter), a centralized recruiting dashboard, and a structured daily operating rhythm. It coordinates all recruiting touchpoints — from initial coach interest signals to follow-up cadences — into one unified, NCAA-compliant system. The goal is to replace fragmented manual workflows with an AI-assisted, data-driven recruiting intelligence layer that gives Jake a measurable edge in recruiting exposure and coach relationship development.
tech_stack: Potential: Hudl API or embed integration (film access)
target_market: College football recruiting stakeholders centered on Jake's recruiting journey, including Jake as the primary athlete, his family as oversight operators, college football coaching staffs at target programs, and recruiting coordinators at Division I, II, and III institutions evaluating skill-position players
current_challenges: Need a stronger recruiting intelligence corpus covering target schools, coaches, depth charts, and program fit signals
Need tighter integration between film libraries, coach outreach sequences, and X (Twitter) visibility campaigns
Need a daily-use dashboard and structured operating rhythm to maintain consistent recruiting activity
Need better systemization of recruiting content creation, distribution, and coach follow-up cadences
Need clear performance metrics to measure recruiting pipeline health and coach engagement over time
Need a scalable method to identify and prioritize best-fit programs based on Jake's athletic profile and academic standing
constraints: Single-athlete focus with limited operator time available for system maintenance and content production
High trust sensitivity with coaches, families, and recruiting relationships requiring careful tone and professionalism
Needs clear NCAA-safe process guidance to avoid recruiting violations related to contact rules, dead periods, and permissible communication
Monthly operating budget capped at $500 USD, requiring cost-efficient tooling and API usage
Must remain flexible as Jake's recruiting profile, offers, and target school list evolve in real time
